description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular footprint. The front facade features a prominent entryway, large windows, and landscaped areas with palm trees and shrubs. The rear of the bungalow opens to a backyard with a swimming pool, surrounded by a paved patio and additional greenery. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored concrete or stucco, with glass windows and metal accents. The building has two visible stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating terraces and balconies. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped front, and a backyard pool, built with light-colored materials and sleek lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped garden, and driveway with palm trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, visible windows, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and the back facade with large windows and balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional landscaping, side windows, and the pool area extending along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and balcony doors
